meta.title: Turkey, the Kurds, and the Middle East: What the Turkish Elections Portend for the Region's Future
meta.description: Amb. James Jeffrey, Tolga Tanis, Gonul Tol, Eric Brown  and Lee Smith discuss the Turkish election results and the Kurds' growing political power.
